channel.title: Nitro Cold Brew on Barista At Home
channel.description: Recent content in Nitro Cold Brew on Barista At Home

item.title: What Is Nitro Cold Brew? The Creamy, No-Ice Coffee Explained (+ Starbucks Guide)
item.description: Nitro cold brew is cold brew coffee infused with nitrogen gas — smooth, creamy, and naturally sweeter with a velvety cascade pour. Here's what's in it, how Starbucks makes it, and how to make it at home.
